_comment: Per-scene golden hashes + Hamming-distance tolerances for the visual gate. Goldens are captured on the OS that CI runs on (currently ubuntu-latest) via the `.github/workflows/visual-recapture.yml` workflow_dispatch job — keeps the verifier (which also runs on ubuntu-latest) at 0 Hamming distance from the golden, leaving the toleranceBits budget purely as headroom against real drift instead of half-spent on a cross-platform OS-rendering delta. toleranceBits is calibrated from observed CI evidence; see scene metadata for sourcing.
